hero.name: Tomasz Sosnowski
hero.tagline: I design and deploy AI automation systems — from architecture to production.

about.title: About me
about.bio: Solo IT in an e-commerce company — I design, build and deploy automation systems end-to-end, from marketplace integrations to AI agents. Outside work I build my own projects: exoplanet detection ML pipelines, NBA game predictors, AI email agents. I care more about understanding the problem than knowing the ready-made solution.

experience.title: Work Experience
bullets: Solo IT — I design, build and deploy systems end-to-end, from architecture to production
Designed event-driven stock sync architecture: SQL Server Change Tracking → RabbitMQ → 15+ marketplaces and shops
Built central product hub (FastAPI + PostgreSQL + Strapi) with offer export pipeline and BigQuery monitoring
36 integration repositories — order automation, stock sync, product images, reports
All services containerized (Docker Compose), CI/CD via GitHub Actions, deployment via Portainer

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: I'm always happy to discuss collaboration or interesting projects.
